meta.title: DEF CON 29 Payment Village - Timur Yunusov - When businesses decide to enrol cryptocurrency cards
meta.description: Cryptocurrencies are the new black. They are everywhere, and even your grandparents may now be gossiping about them. In this talk we will make an overview of risks that your brand new cryptocurrency card may carry with it.
